mainEntity.name: Can I register a retail business in T Nagar?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Private Limited, LLP, or sole proprietorship depending on scale. For Ranganathan Street retail, proprietorship is common for single-owner shops; Private Limited is better for multi-branch operations or those seeking bank loans.

mainEntity.name: What GST considerations exist for T Nagar retail businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: T Nagar retailers must register for GST if turnover exceeds ₹40 lakh (goods) or ₹20 lakh (services). Composition scheme available for traders below ₹1.5 crore — flat 1% GST with simplified compliance.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle income tax filing for T Nagar businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Virtual Auditor provides income tax return filing, tax audit, and advance tax computation for businesses and professionals in T Nagar and across Chennai.

mainEntity.name: How much does company registration cost in T Nagar (Thyagaraya Nagar), Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Total cost for Private Limited Company registration: ₹15,000-₹60,000 including government fees, stamp duty (₹4,000-₹5,000 (TNREGINET e-stamping)), DSC, and professional charges. LLP: ₹8,000-₹15,000. OPC: ₹10,000-₹18,000. Virtual Auditor handles all entity types from our Chennai office.

mainEntity.name: How long does company registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 7-10 working days from complete SPICe+ submission. Name reservation: 2-3 days. COI issuance: 3-5 days after filing. Post-registration compliance (auditor, GST, Professional Tax): additional 1-2 weeks.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for company registration in T Nagar (Thyagaraya Nagar)?

acceptedAnswer.text: PAN and Aadhaar of all directors, passport-size photographs, address proof (voter ID/passport/driving license), registered office proof (rent agreement or ownership deed + NOC from owner + utility bill not older than 2 months), and Digital Signature Certificate (DSC) for all directors.

mainEntity.name: Which entity type should I choose — Private Limited, LLP, or OPC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Planning external funding or FDI: Private Limited (only option VCs invest in). Professional services: LLP (partner flexibility, lower compliance). Solo founder: OPC (converts to Pvt Ltd at ₹2Cr turnover). Virtual Auditor provides entity selection advisory specific to your situation.

mainEntity.name: Can I register a company from a co-working space in T Nagar (Thyagaraya Nagar)?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — co-working spaces offering registered office services provide the NOC, service agreement, and utility bill needed for registration. Verify that the co-working operator provides a dedicated address (not a shared virtual address) as ROC may verify.

mainEntity.name: Can NRIs register a company in T Nagar (Thyagaraya Nagar), Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. NRIs can be directors AND shareholders. At least 1 Indian resident director (182+ days in India) is required. NRI share subscription is treated as FDI — requiring FEMA valuation, FC-GPR filing, and FIRC from day one. Virtual Auditor provides FEMA-integrated registration.

Within 30 days: auditor appointment (ADT-1), bank account, GST, Professional Tax. Quarterly: board meetings. Annually: AGM, AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7A (annual return), DIR-3 KYC. If FDI: FC-GPR + annual FLA return. Virtual Auditor provides ongoing company secretary retainer.

mainEntity.name: Who is the best company registration provider near T Nagar (Thyagaraya Nagar)?

acceptedAnswer.text: Virtual Auditor, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333), provides company registration from offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Website: virtualauditor.in.

mainEntity.name: How long does company registration take in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Timeline varies by complexity. Company registration: 7-10 days. GST registration: 3-7 days. Valuation: 2-3 weeks. Contact Virtual Auditor for specific timelines.

@graph.name: How to Get Company Registration in T Nagar (Thyagaraya Nagar), Chennai

step.name: Entity Selection Advisory
step.text: Evaluate your fundraise plans, founder structure, tax optimization, and FEMA requirements. Private Limited for VC/FDI-bound startups. LLP for professional services. OPC for solo founders.

step.name: Obtain Digital Signature Certificate (DSC)
step.text: Class 3 DSC for all proposed directors from a certified authority. Takes 1-2 days. Cost: ₹1,000-₹2,000 per DSC. For NRI directors: obtainable from Indian or foreign CA.

step.name: Reserve Company Name via RUN
step.text: Submit up to 2 name choices on the MCA portal. Name must be unique on MCA database, not contain prohibited words, and include entity suffix (Private Limited / LLP). Approval: 2-3 days.

step.name: Draft MOA and AOA
step.text: Memorandum of Association defines company objects. Articles of Association define internal rules. For FDI companies: draft broad objects clause and FEMA-compliant articles including preferential allotment, ESOP, and convertible instrument provisions.

step.name: File SPICe+ Part B with AGILE-PRO-S
step.text: Main incorporation form including director DIN application, registered office address, share capital, and subscriber details. Integrated filings: PAN, TAN, EPFO, ESIC, GST registration, and bank account opening.

step.name: Pay Government Fees and Stamp Duty
step.text: Online payment through MCA portal. Government fees based on authorized capital (₹1 lakh = ~₹7,500; ₹10 lakh = ~₹15,500). Stamp duty varies by state.

step.name: Receive Certificate of Incorporation
step.text: Issued by CRC (Central Registration Centre) with CIN, PAN, and TAN. Company is now a legal entity. Post-registration compliance begins immediately — auditor appointment, bank account activation, statutory registers.
